question: The chart shows regional sales share. Which statement is correct according to the chart data?

options.A: Central has the highest sales share.
options.B: West has the highest sales share.
options.C: East has the highest sales share.
options.D: South has the highest sales share.

explanation: From the labels, Central has the highest share (35%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking South is largest when relying on visual comparison.
